description_long: This object consists of two firearms with wooden stocks and drum magazines, accompanied by two black ammunition boxes and several loose cartridges. The firearms have a classic design with a long barrel, prominent front sight, and a large circular drum magazine attached beneath the receiver. The stocks are made of polished wood, contrasting with the dark metallic finish of the barrels and receivers. The ammunition boxes are rectangular, matte black, and labeled with yellow text indicating '7.62x25mm', suggesting the caliber of the ammunition. The overall appearance is robust and utilitarian, with visible screws, trigger guards, and mechanical details on the firearms. The loose cartridges and open ammunition boxes add to the sense of readiness and functionality.
description: A pair of classic wooden-stock firearms with drum magazines, accompanied by black ammunition boxes and loose cartridges. The set features robust metal and wood construction with visible mechanical details.
description_view_0: Two firearms with wooden stocks and drum magazines are positioned in front of black ammunition boxes, with loose cartridges visible between them.
description_view_1: A side profile of one firearm shows the full length of the wooden stock, the drum magazine, and the side of the ammunition box with yellow labeling.
description_view_2: The rear and angled view highlights the backs of the ammunition boxes and the rear ends of the firearms, with less detail visible on the stocks.
description_view_3: A top-down view displays both firearms laid out parallel, showing the circular drum magazines, the tops of the ammunition boxes, and the arrangement of loose cartridges.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, standard barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
